prompt: Prepare a release for this project. There have been several changes since v1.2.0.

assertions.text: Version bumped to 1.3.0 (MINOR bump for new features)
CHANGELOG contains a ## [1.3.0] section with today's date (2026-04-01)
CHANGELOG has both Added and Fixed categories with correct entries
package.json version field matches the changelog version (1.3.0)
Comparison link added at bottom of CHANGELOG
Commit message follows chore(release): X.Y.Z format
